abilities.effect: The grimoire offers you a glimpse into the truth of things. Seek or Recall Knowledge.
abilities.name: Activate
abilities.requirement: Your last action was to cast a divination spell prepared from this grimoire

stat_block.text: A female figure peers through her blindfold from the cover of this stately tome.

traits.name: Divination
traits.text: The divination school of magic typically involves obtaining or transferring information, or predicting events.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

variants.name: Codex of Unimpeded Sight (Greater)
variants.text: The frequency of the activation is once per hour instead of once per day. When you use it, you gain a +1 item bonus on your Perception check to Seek or skill check to Recall Knowledge.
